entries.summary: Fixed schema mismatch: OpenHermes has extra 'weight' field in conversations. Added normalize_conversations() to strip extra fields. Also fixed missing format_quran() call.
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. All 3 datasets now produce same schema: List({'from': Value('string'), 'value': Value('string')}). normalize_conversations() strips weight/role/etc fields. format_quran() was defined but not called - fixed.
decisions: All datasets must have same schema: {"from": str, "value": str}
format_quran() must be called before normalize_conversations()
